techniques.legacy_behavior: Initialize UE positions with reduced/clockless equations before the full-clock solve.
techniques.why_it_helped: Keeps the nonlinear full-clock solve from starting too far from the geometry.
techniques.v24_port: Implement as a package-native Step 1 initializer using measurement residual cost only, then lift into the gauged V24 theta vector.
tests_required: improves or does not worsen residual in deterministic toy cases

techniques.technique: full-clock internal solve with gauge-relative reporting
techniques.legacy_behavior: Solve an all-clock symbolic state, then report position/synchronization errors after post-processing.
techniques.why_it_helped: The optimizer had enough internal degrees of freedom to absorb clock biases.
techniques.v24_port: Use the explicit V24 gauged parameter vector internally, not all-clock state; report clocks relative to the reference satellite.

techniques.legacy_behavior: Use rank-tolerant linear algebra and dependent-row handling in difficult geometries.
techniques.why_it_helped: Prevents brittle failures in underconstrained or nearly singular intermediate stages.
techniques.v24_port: Allow rank-tolerant damped updates as diagnostic/non-successful initializers; do not report finite CRLB unless subspace estimability is proven.
tests_required: finite CRLB only for full rank
damped update never mislabeled as convergence

techniques.legacy_behavior: Use LM-style damping in the full nonlinear solve.
techniques.why_it_helped: Stabilizes nonlinear TOA residual minimization compared with raw Gauss-Newton.
techniques.v24_port: Package-native LM with accepted-step criteria based on weighted residual decrease and bounded step norms.
tests_required: weighted residual decreases on accepted steps
no manuscript figure generated by unit tests

techniques.legacy_behavior: Some LM/MAP acceptance or fallback decisions compare against true state error.
techniques.why_it_helped: Can suppress bad-looking estimates in replay plots, but leaks oracle information.
techniques.v24_port: Replace with observable criteria: weighted measurement residual, prior innovation, covariance trace, and consistency gates.

techniques.legacy_behavior: Fallback paths keep a usable trajectory when a solver stage fails.
techniques.why_it_helped: Avoids catastrophic rows dominating small Monte Carlo grids.
techniques.v24_port: Implement explicit fallback hierarchy with status flags; include failed/fallback rows in diagnostics instead of hiding them.

techniques.legacy_behavior: Plotting cells smooth or manually transform displayed curves.
techniques.why_it_helped: Improves visual readability but can obscure raw algorithm behavior.
techniques.v24_port: Keep raw CSV/NPZ as the authority; any smoothing must be a separate display transform recorded in metadata.

recommendation: Port estimator behavior before rerunning final manuscript figures; do not port truth-gated decisions.
